title: Add #![forbid(unsafe_code)] to lichen-oscore, lichen-coap, lichen-embassy
description: Add the forbid unsafe_code attribute to lib.rs crate roots for these no_std crates. Confirm no unsafe blocks exist in them. Update any submodule attributes if needed. Follow no_std and coding conventions exactly.
